privileged_info_summary: The correct top 5 busiest standard edges to identify in the baseline simulation are 204a[0] (2733 entered vehicles), 43[0] (1937 entered vehicles), 204b[0] (1820 entered vehicles), 209 (1679 entered vehicles), and 53[0] (1678 entered vehicles). To penalize these edges correctly, the agent must write pricing weights assigning a travel time of at least 1000.0 to each of these edge IDs. Duarouter requires the --ignore-errors flag to proceed past initial vehicle type warnings and successfully write the route file. The dataset represents a real neighborhood in Bologna.
